## Inputs


<div class="x2mdx-ref-panel">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-panel-head">
    <h3>AuthorizeRequest</h3>
    
  </div>
  
  
  
<dl class="x2mdx-ref-meta-grid">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Message</dt>
    <dd>com.digitalasset.canton.topology.admin.v30.AuthorizeRequest</dd>
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Client stream</dt>
    <dd>No</dd>
  </div>
  
</dl>

  
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">proposal</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Proposal</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* Propose a transaction and distribute it. If authorize if the node has enough signing keys</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">transaction_hash</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* Authorize a transaction, meaning the node needs to be able to fully sign it locally. Hash is in hexadecimal format.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">must_fully_authorize</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* If true: the transaction is only signed if the new signatures will result in the transaction being fully authorized. Otherwise returns as an error. If false: the transaction is signed and the signature distributed. The transaction may still not be fully authorized and remain as a proposal.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">force_changes</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated ForceFlag</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* Force specific changes even if dangerous</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signed_by</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* Fingerprint of the keys signing the authorization The signing key is used to identify a particular `NamespaceDelegation` certificate, which is used to justify the given authorization. Optional, if empty, suitable signing keys available known to the node are automatically selected.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">store</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">StoreId</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* The store that is used as the underlying source for executing this request. If `store` is a synchronizer store, the resulting topology transaction will only be available on the respective synchronizer. If `store` is the authorized store, the resulting topology transaction may or may not be synchronized automatically to all synchronizers that the node is currently connected to or will be connected to in the future. Selecting a specific synchronizers store might be necessary, if the transaction to authorize by hash or the previous generation of the submitted proposal is only available on the synchronizers store and not in the authorized store.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">wait_to_become_effective</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Duration</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* Optional timeout to wait for the transaction to become effective in the store.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>

    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">* the generated signed topology transaction</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.VettedPackages">

<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">participant_uid</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the participant vetting the packages</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">package_ids</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">DEPRECATED: no longer used, but kept for backwards compatibility. the hashes of the vetted packages. package hashes may only be listed in one of the two fields: package_ids or packages. a package listed in package_ids is equivalent to a package listed in packages with unbounded validity.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">packages</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated VettedPackage</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the hashes of vetted packages with a validity period. only one entry per package_id is permitted.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.VettedPackages.VettedPackage">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-vettedpackages-vettedpackage">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">

      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the hash of the vetted package</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">valid_from_inclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Timestamp</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">optional earliest ledger effective time (inclusive) as of which the package is considered valid. must be less than or equal to valid_until if both are present.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">valid_until_exclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Timestamp</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">optional latest ledger effective time (exclusive) until which the package is considered valid. must be greater than or equal to valid_from if both are present.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.PartyToParticipant">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-partytoparticipant">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the party that is to be represented by the participants</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the signatory threshold required by the participants to be able to act on behalf of the party. a mapping with threshold &gt; 1 is considered a definition of a consortium party</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">participants</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated HostingParticipant</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">which participants will host the party. if threshold &gt; 1, must be Confirmation or Observation. if all participants have Observation permission, the confirmation treshold is ignored, making the party a purely observing party.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party_signing_keys</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeysWithThreshold</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Contains protocol signing keys for the party used to authorize externally signed Daml transactions, along with a signing threshold. The max number of keys is 20</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.TrafficControlParameters">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-trafficcontrolparameters">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">max_base_traffic_amount</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">[doc-entry-start: TrafficControlParameters] In bytes, the maximum amount of base traffic that can be accumulated</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">max_base_traffic_accumulation_duration</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Duration</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Maximum duration over which the base rate can be accumulated Consequently, base_traffic_rate = max_base_traffic_amount / max_base_traffic_accumulation_duration</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">read_vs_write_scaling_factor</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Read scaling factor to compute the event cost. In parts per 10 000.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">set_balance_request_submission_window_size</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Duration</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Window size used to compute the max sequencing time of a submission request This impacts how quickly a submission is expected to be accepted before a retry should be attempted by the caller Default is 5 minutes</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">enforce_rate_limiting</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">If true, submission requests without enough traffic credit will not be delivered</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">base_event_cost</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">In bytes, base event cost added to all sequenced events. Optional</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">free_confirmation_responses</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Whether to charge for confirmation responses Default: false</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.AcsCommitmentsCatchUpConfig">

  </div>

      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the signature threshold required to reach consensus among the mediators</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">active</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>

  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">observers</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the list of observing mediators (uid) within the group (read messages but don&#x27;t respond)</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.SequencerSynchronizerState">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-sequencersynchronizerstate">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">synchronizer_id</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the synchronizer id of the sequencer group</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The system can tolerate up to min(threshold - 1, (activeWithSigningKey.size - 1)/3) malicious active sequencers, where activeWithSigningKey is the set of sequencers from active that have an active OwnerToKeyMapping with a signing key. In order to make the system resilient against f malicious active sequencers, you need to: (1) configure threshold := f + 1, (2) possibly add active sequencers such that f &lt;= (activeWithSigningKey.size - 1)/3. (3) possibly register signing keys for active sequencers,</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">active</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the list of active sequencers If a sequencer without an active signing key is added to this set, it has no effect on the topology state.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">observers</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the list of observing sequencers (uid) within the group (read messages but don&#x27;t respond)</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.SignedTopologyTransaction">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-signedtopologytransaction">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">transaction</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">serialized topology transaction (protobuf bytestring)</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signatures</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated Signature</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">multiple signatures Either this field OR the multi_transaction_signatures field MUST contain at least one signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">proposal</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">if true, this transaction is just a proposal. this means that every signature is valid, but the signatures are insufficient to properly authorize the transaction. proposals are distributed via the topology channel too. proposals will be pruned automatically when the nodes are pruned TODO(#14045) implement pruning</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">multi_transaction_signatures</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated MultiTransactionSignatures</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">If set, the transaction may be authorized by signing a hash computed from multiple transaction hashes This allows to effectively authorize multiple transactions with a single signature. Each item MUST contain the hash of this transaction Optional</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.Signature">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signature">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signed_by</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The fingerprint/id of the keypair used to create this signature and needed to verify. If a signature delegation is defined, this fingerprint/id is not used to produce the signature, and, instead is used to sign the delegation.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signing_algorithm_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningAlgorithmSpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing algorithm specification used to produce this signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature_delegation</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureDelegation</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">An optional signature delegation where a long-term signing key authorizes a session signing key to sign on its behalf.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SignatureFormat">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signatureformat">
  
  
  
  <ul class="x2mdx-ref-enum-list">
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_RAW</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_DER</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_CONCAT</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_SYMBOLIC</code></li>
    
  </ul>
  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningAlgorithmSpec">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingalgorithmspec">
  
  
  
  <ul class="x2mdx-ref-enum-list">
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_ED25519</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_EC_DSA_SHA_256</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_EC_DSA_SHA_384</code></li>
    
  </ul>
  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SignatureDelegation">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signaturedelegation">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">session_key</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">ASN.1 + DER-encoding of X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo structure of the session public key: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5280#section-4.1. This key was used to produce the actual signature.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">session_key_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeySpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing key spec for the session key.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">validity_period_from_inclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">A timestamp in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch that indicates when the session key is considered valid.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">validity_period_duration_seconds</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Duration in seconds indicating how long the session key remains valid. The validity period starts from `validity_period_from_inclusive` above.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The format of the signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signature of the combined hash of the session key fingerprint, validity period, and synchronizer id, by the long-term key. This signature authorizes the session key to act on behalf of the long-term key.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signing_algorithm_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningAlgorithmSpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing algorithm specification used to produce this signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.MultiTransactionSignatures">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-multitransactionsignatures">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">transaction_hashes</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">List of topology transaction hashes. Required</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signatures</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated Signature</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Signatures on the combined hash computed over the transaction_hashes MUST contain at least one</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

</AccordionGroup>


</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.topology.admin.v30.TopologyManagerWriteService/Authorize <<'EOF'
{
  "proposal": {
    "change": "TOPOLOGY_CHANGE_OP_UNSPECIFIED",
    "serial": 0,
    "mapping": {
      "namespaceDelegation": {
        "namespace": "string",
        "targetKey": {},
        "isRootDelegation": true,
        "canSignAllMappings": {}
      }
    }
  },
  "mustFullyAuthorize": true,
  "forceChanges": [
    "FORCE_FLAG_UNSPECIFIED"
  ],
  "signedBy": [
    "string"
  ],
  "store": {
    "authorized": {}
  },
  "waitToBecomeEffective": "string"
}
EOF
```

</div>
  </div>
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code x2mdx-ref-rail-code--response">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">OK</span>
  
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-response-label">application/json</span>
  
</div>

```json OK
{
  "transaction": {
    "transaction": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
    "signatures": [
      {
        "format": "SIGNATURE_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED",
        "signature": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
        "signedBy": "string",
        "signingAlgorithmSpec": "SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED",
        "signatureDelegation": {
          "sessionKey": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
          "sessionKeySpec": "SIGNING_KEY_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED",
          "validityPeriodFromInclusive": "0",
          "validityPeriodDurationSeconds": 0,
          "format": "SIGNATURE_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED",
          "signature": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
          "signingAlgorithmSpec": "SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED"
        }
      }
    ],
    "proposal": true,
    "multiTransactionSignatures": [
      {
        "transactionHashes": [
          "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES"
        ],
        "signatures": [
          {
            "format": "SIGNATURE_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED",
            "signature": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
            "signedBy": "string",
            "signingAlgorithmSpec": "SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED",
            "signatureDelegation": {}
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

</div>
  </div>
  
</div>

</div>
